name: SEPTOOPTIC DYSPLASIA
definition: DE MORSIER SYNDROME rare anterior midline anomaly with
distribution: bulbous dilatation of anterior recess of 3rd ventricle
discriminating_features: hypoplasia of optic nerves + chiasm + infundibulum
fused dilated boxlike frontal horns squared off dorsally + pointing inferiorly
bulbous dilatation of anterior recess of 3rd ventricle

general: hypoplasia of optic nerves + chiasm + infundibulum
fused dilated boxlike frontal horns squared off dorsally + pointing inferiorly
bulbous dilatation of anterior recess of 3rd ventricle
